title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team uses with Claude Code: automating existing workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building bespoke tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He frames Claude Code as a leverage tool that avoids the pitfall of adding busywork when applied strategically.
